data.mission:
Mission: "A 3d star fighter game"
Goals: fun pc game.. use direction keys to move and spacebar to shoot, beat levels that are progressively harder and a final boss, the star field is like a graph nodes in 3d space we fly around, keep score
Constraints: a single HTML file
Metrics: user is happy and earns badges
Timeframe:
